mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attendance_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record ( employee_id, group_id, attendance_date, punch_in_time, punch_out_time, punch_in_status, punch_out_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{groupId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{punchInTime}, #{punchOutTime}, #{punchInStatus}, #{punchOutStatus}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET punch_in_time = #{punchInTime}, punch_in_status = #{punchInStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE attendance_record SET punch_out_time = #{punchOutTime}, punch_out_status = #{punchOutStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
